What we do

BIRMINGHAM'S
AWARD WINNING ESTATE AGENCY

As leading independent sales and letting agents, we have built our business on over 40 years of experience. We strongly understand Birmingham’s city centre residential and commercial property markets, making us the go-to estate and lettings agents.
This helps us lead estate agencies in this lively city, particularly among the letting agents in Birmingham. Celebrated for our dedication to innovation and customer satisfaction, we have proudly earned multiple awards that reflect our commitment to helping clients.
Whether you’re a first-time buyer, a seasoned investor, or looking to sell your property, our expert team guides you every step of the way. We leverage cutting-edge technology and deep market insights to provide tailored solutions that meet your unique needs. Our reputation is built not just on awards but on the trust and loyalty of our clients. Join us as we explore what makes Birmingham’s award-winning estate agency the preferred choice for property transactions in this vibrant city and discover how we can turn your dreams into reality.

Find out more

92

years of experience from our leadership team

200+

Properties to buy or rent

WHAT CAN WE DO FOR YOU

Services we offer

Whether you’re selling or renting apartments or houses in Birmingham city centre, we handle everything professionally. As estate agents in Birmingham with over 22 years of focussed trading experience, we are committed to delivering exceptional managed letting services to landlords & successful sales for vendors. Trust us to guide your sale or manage your property with expertise and dedication.

About Us

Residential Sales

Residential Lettings

Commercial Property

Developments

News

Find out how much your home is worth

Building on our reputation as Birmingham’s award-winning estate agency, our expertise extends beyond buying and selling properties to include comprehensive estate and lettings services.
As a leading estate agent in Birmingham, we’re proud to offer a Fully Managed Letting Service. This service, fundamental to residential lettings in Birmingham, removes the hassle of maintaining a tenanted property.

Book a valuation

Get in touch

We provide a comprehensive range of services to meet all your property needs. Our dedicated team of professionals is committed to delivering exceptional service and ensuring your experience with us is seamless and successful. 

How can we help you?

Your Explicit Consent You must be 18 years or older to register for our property matching service through this website ("Service").

From time to time we will send you information about properties that we feel may be of interest to you and/or provide you with information about our valuation services.

Our Privacy Policy and Notice describes how we use your data, who we might share it with and what rights you have.
